sections.content:
Good, board is reset. Now let me try the right-to-left fill order:
- Red container (filled R->L): O, p, R means slots are R, p, O (L->R)
- Green container (filled R->L): b, N, Y, M means slots are M, Y, N, b (L->R)
So:
- Red slot 1 (22, 22): R
- Red slot 2 (22, 28): p
- Red slot 3 (22, 40): O
- Green slot 1 (36, 22): M
- Green slot 2 (36, 28): Y
- Green slot 3 (36, 34): N
- Green slot 4 (36, 40): b
Palette: R=10, p=17, N=24, O=31, M=38, b=45, Y=52

]
